name: Grilled Swiss Cheese Sandwich
brief_description: Classic grilled cheese sandwich featuring nutty Swiss cheese melted between buttery, crispy whole grain bread slices. Quick and comforting.

instructions.text: Heat a grill pan or non-stick skillet over medium-low heat.
Spread butter evenly on one side of each bread slice. Place one slice buttered-side down in the skillet.
Place Swiss cheese slices evenly over the bread in the pan.
Top with the remaining bread slice, buttered-side up.
Cook until the bottom is golden brown, about 2-3 minutes. Flip carefully with a spatula and cook until the other side is crispy and the cheese is fully melted.
Transfer to a serving plate and let cool for 1 minute before cutting diagonally if desired.
Serve immediately while warm and crispy.

recipe_notes: Cook over medium-low heat to prevent the bread from burning while allowing the cheese to melt completely
If the cheese is not melting, cover the pan briefly for 30 seconds to trap heat
For extra flavor, try adding a pinch of garlic powder to the butter before spreading
storage_notes: Best served immediately while hot and crispy
Not recommended for storage as the bread will become soggy upon cooling
